name: Owl's Nest Golf Club
about: Owl's Nest Golf Club is part of the Owl's Nest Resort, located in the White Mountains of New Hampshire. The facility features a championship golf course known for its scenic vistas, elevation changes, and immaculate playing conditions. It also operates an indoor golf simulator venue located within the Slice Pizzeria & Sports Bar, offering year-round entertainment. The resort provides a comprehensive experience combining on-course play with indoor technology, dining, and various other resort amenities for both members and guests.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to golf via indoor simulators
Convenient on-site dining and bar at Slice Pizzeria & Sports Bar
Located within a full-service resort with multiple amenities

food_and_drink.notes: On-site restaurant at Slice Pizzeria & Sports Bar
Full bar service available at Slice Pizzeria & Sports Bar

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs, but club rentals may be available. Please contact the venue for specific details.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers an on-site restaurant and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time for 18 holes depends on simulator usage and booking details. Contact the venue for specific time estimates.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior summer camps and is part of a family-oriented resort, making it suitable for children.
